title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 07 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 07 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 07 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 07/07/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose by 1.87% today, the main contract closed at 812.5.The traders' willingness to ship isless.The steel mills are not active to purchase. The overall trading sentiment of the market is worse. PBF at Tangshan port deal 903 yuan/mt.
